results.name: LM Cascades
results.rationale: General LM cascade framework; no whakapapa K-generation ancestor name chains, per-name phrase-tag mnemonics, junior-to-senior call-response, kalokalo resets, or tapu/mana integrity binding.

results.name: Unified Routing-Cascading
results.rationale: Routing/cascading; no whakapapa generational naming, mnemonic phrase tags, kalokalo resets, or tapu binding.

results.name: MoT Cascade
results.rationale: MoT cascade; no K-generation, no per-name canonical phrase, no junior-to-senior line transfer, no kalokalo, no tapu.

results.rationale: Speculative + cascade; no whakapapa K-generation name chain, mnemonic, kalokalo reset, or tapu.

results.name: Checkpoint/Restore
results.rationale: Checkpoint generic; not kalokalo ritual reset framing; no whakapapa, mnemonic, junior-senior cascade, tapu.

results.name: RAG Errors
results.rationale: RAG error analysis; no whakapapa, mnemonic, cascade, kalokalo, tapu.

decision_rationale: All papers at 0.10 floor. WHAKAPAPA composite absent from all 8 papers. Primary v6 PASS aligns with verifier v6 PASS — Pattern E MITIGATED.
